_source: Bedrock Claude schema audit, run 2026-05-21 against a sample of the catholic-charities multi-org CSV. Column names below are in the CSV header form (e.g. '21b_Visit_Type_Name'); the loader in analytics_helpers.py normalizes them to the Athena form ('visit_type_name_21b'). Re-run the audit periodically (quarterly or when the source CSV format changes) and replace this file. Do NOT hand-edit individual entries — fix the audit prompt and regenerate so the dataset stays the source of truth.
row_grain_explanation: Each row represents a single clinical service visit (client visit) documented in the EHR, identified by a unique Service_ID.

columns.name: 50_Visit_Link
columns.note: URL to the visit record in CredibleBH; not useful for analytics queries.

columns.name: 1_Service_ID
columns.note: Unique visit identifier. Contains commas as thousand separators; use REPLACE(col,',','') before casting to integer.

columns.name: 2_Consumer_Name
columns.note: Full name of the consumer/patient. May represent a school name for Tier 1/2 school-wide services.

columns.name: 3_Consumer_DOB
columns.note: Format 'MM/DD/YYYY HH:MM AM/PM'. Use date_parse(col, '%m/%d/%Y %r') or substring to parse date only.

columns.name: 4_Episode_ID
columns.note: Episode identifier linking visits to a treatment episode. Contains commas; use REPLACE(col,',','') before casting.

columns.name: 5_Staff_Name
columns.note: Name of the staff member who provided the service.

columns.name: 6_Staff_ID
columns.note: Numeric staff identifier. Contains commas; use REPLACE(col,',','') before casting to integer.

columns.name: 7_Program
columns.note: Numeric program code. Use SELECT DISTINCT to see all values.

columns.name: 7b_Program_Name
values: Free Standing Mental Health Clinic - Counseling
columns.note: Use SELECT DISTINCT for full set; more than 8 exist including Intake, Quality Assurance, Housing Support Services, CNPP.

columns.name: 8_Service_Date
columns.note: Format 'MM/DD/YYYY'. Use date_parse(col, '%m/%d/%Y') to parse.

columns.name: 9_Start_Time
columns.note: Format 'MM/DD/YYYY H:MM AM/PM'. Use date_parse(col, '%m/%d/%Y %r') to parse.

columns.name: 10_End_Time
columns.note: Format 'MM/DD/YYYY H:MM AM/PM'. Use date_parse(col, '%m/%d/%Y %r') to parse.

columns.name: 11_Revised_Start
columns.note: Revised start time; same format as 9_Start_Time.

columns.name: 12_Revised_End
columns.note: Revised end time; same format as 10_End_Time.

columns.name: 13_Duration
columns.note: Duration of service in minutes. Use TRY_CAST(REPLACE(col,',','') AS integer).

columns.name: 14_Signed_Time
columns.note: Timestamp when note was signed. Format 'MM/DD/YYYY H:MM AM/PM'.

columns.name: 15_Transferred_Time
columns.note: Timestamp when note was transferred/finalized. Format 'MM/DD/YYYY H:MM AM/PM'.

columns.name: 16_CPT_Code
columns.note: CPT or internal billing code for the service (e.g. 90834, H0036, SI-SCREEN, NOTE). Use SELECT DISTINCT for full set.

columns.name: 26s_Client_Insurance_Order
columns.note: Pipe-delimited list of consumer insurance plans with priority order and ClientInsIDs.

columns.name: 26b_Billing_Order
columns.note: Numeric billing order (1, 2, 3). Use TRY_CAST(col AS integer).

columns.name: 26c_Billing_Sequence
columns.note: Numeric billing sequence. Use TRY_CAST(col AS integer).

columns.name: 26t_Billing_Group_ID
columns.note: Numeric group ID for billing. Use SELECT DISTINCT for values.

columns.name: 26u_Billing_Group_Name
columns.note: Use SELECT DISTINCT for the complete list.

columns.name: 17_Units
columns.note: Number of billing units. Use TRY_CAST(col AS double).

columns.name: 18_Rate
columns.note: Billing rate in dollars. Use TRY_CAST(col AS double).

columns.name: 19_Modifier_1
columns.note: First billing modifier. Often blank.

columns.name: 20_Modifier_2
columns.note: Second billing modifier. Rarely populated.

columns.name: 21_Visit_Type_ID
columns.note: Numeric visit type code. Use SELECT DISTINCT for values.

columns.name: 21b_Visit_Type_Name
columns.note: Visit type label (e.g. Community Support, SBMH Indiv Therapy, Suicide Screening, General Note). Use SELECT DISTINCT.

columns.name: 22_Location_Code
columns.note: Numeric location code. Use SELECT DISTINCT.

columns.name: 22b_Location_Label
columns.note: Use SELECT DISTINCT for full set.

columns.name: 23_Recipient_Code
columns.note: Numeric recipient code. Use SELECT DISTINCT.

columns.name: 23b_Recipient_Label
columns.note: Use SELECT DISTINCT for full set.

columns.name: 26_Authorization_ID
columns.note: Authorization number. Contains commas; use REPLACE(col,',',''). Often blank.

columns.name: 27_Narrative_Simple
columns.note: Supervisor or reviewer narrative comments. Usually blank.

columns.name: 28_Narrative_Rich
columns.note: Structured clinical documentation with form answers embedded in brackets. Very long; use for keyword search with LIKE.

columns.name: 47g_Tx_Plus_Intervention_Documentation
columns.note: Intervention documentation linking to the treatment plan. Contains HTML tags.

columns.name: 47e_Plan_Documentation
columns.note: Plan-level documentation tied to objectives. Contains HTML tags.

columns.name: 29c_Next_Steps_Effective
columns.note: Effective next steps narrative. Rarely populated.

columns.name: 29b_Next_Steps_Form_Only
columns.note: Form-only next steps. Rarely populated.

columns.name: 29_Next_Steps
columns.note: Next steps narrative. Rarely populated outside 28_Narrative_Rich.

columns.name: 30_31_Form_Q_and_A
columns.note: Flattened Q&A from structured forms. Pipe-delimited key-value pairs. Use for keyword search.

columns.name: 32_Vitals_BP
columns.note: Blood pressure reading in 'systolic/diastolic' format (e.g. '137/85'). Parse with SPLIT(col,'/').

columns.name: 33_Vitals_Pulse
columns.note: Pulse in BPM. Use TRY_CAST(col AS integer).

columns.name: 34_Vitals_Temp
columns.note: Temperature in Fahrenheit. Use TRY_CAST(col AS double).

columns.name: 35_Vitals_Weight
columns.note: Weight in pounds. Use TRY_CAST(col AS double).

columns.name: 38_Plan_Start_Date
columns.note: Format 'MM/DD/YYYY HH:MM:SS AM'. Use date_parse(col, '%m/%d/%Y %r') or substring for date.

columns.name: 39_Plan_End_Date
columns.note: Format 'MM/DD/YYYY HH:MM:SS AM'. Use date_parse(col, '%m/%d/%Y %r') or substring for date.

columns.name: 40_Plan_Status
columns.note: Indicates whether there is an active plan. Appears always 'Yes' when populated.

columns.name: 41b_Diagnosis_Code_Primary
columns.note: Primary ICD-10 diagnosis code (e.g. F25.1, F33.1, F90.2). Use SELECT DISTINCT for common values.

columns.name: 44_External_ID
columns.note: External system identifier for the consumer.

columns.name: 45_Insurance
columns.note: Insurance name billed (e.g. AmeriHealth, DC Medicaid iCAMS, Medicare). Use SELECT DISTINCT.

columns.name: 46_Plan_Type
columns.note: Numeric plan type code. 10=Community Support, 9=ACT, 2=Compass, 6/7=Counseling/FSMHC, 11=Children's/SBMH, 12=CNPP.

columns.name: 47b_Plan_Goals_Only
columns.note: Consumer's plan goals in HTML. Pipe-delimited goals with status annotations.
columns.do_not_use_for: Despite 'only' in name, this is long prose — not a boolean flag.

columns.name: 47c_Plan_Objectives_Only
columns.note: Plan objectives in HTML. Pipe-delimited objectives with status annotations.
columns.do_not_use_for: Despite 'only' in name, this is long prose — not a boolean flag.

columns.name: 47d_Plan_Interventions_Only
columns.note: Plan interventions in HTML. Pipe-delimited intervention descriptions.
columns.do_not_use_for: Despite 'only' in name, this is long prose — not a boolean flag.

columns.name: 48_Plan_Signed_Date
columns.note: Format 'MM/DD/YYYY H:MM AM/PM'. Use date_parse(col, '%m/%d/%Y %r').

columns.name: 49_Plan_Signer
columns.note: Name of plan signer in 'Last, First' format.

columns.name: 49g_Plan_QP_Signer
columns.note: Qualified Professional who co-signed the plan, with title.

columns.name: 49h_Plan_Signed_Date_QP
columns.note: QP co-signature date. Format 'MM/DD/YYYY H:MM AM/PM'. Use date_parse(col, '%m/%d/%Y %r').

column_groups.name: visit_times
column_groups.note: Use 8_Service_Date for date-level aggregation. Use 11/12 Revised times for actual duration; 13_Duration is the pre-calculated minutes.

column_groups.name: visit_type_classification
column_groups.note: Use 21b_Visit_Type_Name for service type analysis; 16_CPT_Code for billing; 7b_Program_Name for program-level grouping.

column_groups.name: plan_dates
column_groups.note: Use 38/39 for plan period; 48 for when signed by consumer; 49h for QP co-sign.

column_groups.name: plan_content
column_groups.note: These are the treatment plan narrative fields. Goals for high-level aims, Objectives for measurable targets, Interventions for provider actions.

column_groups.name: clinical_documentation
column_groups.note: 28 is the primary clinical note; 30_31 is the flattened structured form data (easier to search). 47g/47e link interventions to the plan.

column_groups.name: vitals
column_groups.note: Only populated for med clinic / nursing visits.

column_groups.name: billing_insurance
column_groups.note: 45_Insurance is the payer billed. 18_Rate * 17_Units approximates revenue. 26s has all plans on file.
